mdRecord.dcterms:title: Criminal Warrants, Justice of the Peace: Commonwealth vs Gabriel Lesueur
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Commonwealth vs Gabriel Lesueur Offense: Assault against the peace and dignity of the county Victim: Complainant: Recorded in Floyd County Courthouse 06.29.1887 Guilty Fine:$5.00 Court Cost: $3.08
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
Warrants (Law)
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
